seoTitle: Duns Creek vs Dural — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Duns Creek and Dural. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Duns Creek vs Dural: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Duns Creek and Dural.
heading: Duns Creek vs Dural — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Duns Creek, New South Wales and Dural, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dural has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Duns Creek (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Duns Creek or Dural safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Duns Creek has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Dural scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Duns Creek scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Dural scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Duns Creek or Dural?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dural has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
